body:
Mina, I've been meaning to reach out properly since we last crossed paths at the [Threshold Ventures](people/mina-kapoor) holiday mixer — felt like we barely got five minutes before the room swallowed us both up. I wanted to follow up on the conversation we started around grid-edge compute and whether there's a real wedge for an infrastructure play at the intersection of demand response and on-prem AI workloads. At [Halfway Capital](org/halfway-capital) we've been tracking a handful of teams in this space and I'm increasingly convinced the seed window is tightening faster than most people realize. Would love to grab 30 minutes in the new year to compare notes — I suspect our deal flow overlaps more than either of us knows, and there may be room to co-lead something if the right company surfaces. Let me know what your January looks like and we can find a slot.

Amara
